## Security considerations

If this PR touches encryption, authentication, or data storage:
- [ ] I have reviewed [ARCHITECTURE.md](ARCHITECTURE.md) for threat models
- [ ] I have verified RLS policies are correct
- [ ] I have checked for hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] No plaintext keys are exposed in the code

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested this locally
- [ ] I have updated the documentation if needed
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines in [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have not added any dependencies without justification
- [ ] I have not introduced new console errors or warnings
